chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 134 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 10.12.2024 Mr. Badaruddin Memon, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press instant Constitutional Petition, which is not opposed by learned AAG Sindh. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
